{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = The Lady
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[The Lady]] is approaching.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17">''Ghostwater'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
